ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "key" REAL /* Musical key of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score indicating presence of audience noise */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode (major/minor) of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" REAL /* Time signature of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score indicating musical positiveness */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist of the track */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the track belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "explicit_lyrics" INTEGER /* Whether the track has explicit lyrics */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenre" TEXT /* Subgenre of the music */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation date */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Whether the user has a premium subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist to which the track belongs */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track included in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., play, skip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user rating the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating score given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the track is recommended */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the recommended track */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for recommendation */,
  "recommended_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_genre" TEXT /* Preferred genre of music */,
  "favorite_artist" TEXT /* Favorite artist of the user */,
  "favorite_playlist" INTEGER /* Favorite playlist of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres the artist is associated with */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who follows the artist */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date the follow was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track liked by the user */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Date the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dislikes" (
  "dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dislike record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who disliked the track */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track disliked by the user */,
  "disliked_at" TEXT /* Date the dislike was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislikes_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dislikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
